heading: Public lands telecommunications cooperative agreements
label: 8453 Public lands telecommunications cooperative agreements
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended , Public Lands.section 143 of Pub. L. 118–234section 143 of Pub. L. 118–234section 1761a of Title 43
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended , Public Lands.section 143 of Pub. L. 118–234section 143 of Pub. L. 118–234section 1761a of Title 43

children.heading: Cooperative agreements for the Department of the Interior
children.label: a Cooperative agreements for the Department of the Interior

children.text: preparing needs assessments or other programmatic analyses necessary to establish communications sites and authorize communications uses on or adjacent to Federal recreational lands and waters managed by a Federal land management agency;

developing management plans for communications sites on or adjacent to Federal recreational lands and waters managed by a Federal land management agency on a competitively neutral, technology neutral, nondiscriminatory basis;
training for management of communications sites on or adjacent to Federal recreational lands and waters managed by a Federal land management agency;
obtaining, improving access to, or establishing communications sites on or adjacent to Federal recreational lands and waters managed by a Federal land management agency; and
any combination of purposes described in subparagraphs (1) through (5).1So in original. Probably should be “paragraphs”.1

children.heading: Assessment of rental fee retention authority
children.label: c Assessment of rental fee retention authority
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall conduct a comprehensive assessment to evaluate the potential benefits of rental fee retention whereby any fee collected for the occupancy and use of Federal lands and waters authorized by a communications use authorization would be deposited into a special account and used solely for activities related to communications sites on lands and waters managed by the Secretary.January 4, 2025
